hero.subtitle: Family-owned and driven by quality. We treat every home like our own — with care, precision, and the kind of clean you'll notice.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: Family-Owned. Quality-Driven.
about.p1: Havana Cleaning was founded by a family who believes every home deserves to feel spotless. We bring care, pride, and attention to detail to every job.
about.p2: We're not just a cleaning company. We're a family business built on trust, hard work, and the belief that a clean home is the foundation of a happy life.
about.p3: From Florida neighborhoods to homes across the country — we bring the same level of care and professionalism to every job. Our team is background-checked and trained to deliver results you'll love.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to Experience the Havana Difference?
about.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of happy families who trust us with their homes.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Our Services
services.customCleanDesc: Tell us what you need and we'll create a plan just for you.
services.bookOnline: Book online in minutes. Pick your time and we handle the rest.

pricing.label: Transparent Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprises. Priced by your home size — choose the plan that fits.
pricing.heroSubtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Prices vary by home size, service type, and add-ons. Florida sales tax (7%) applies.
pricing.addOnsSubtitle: Customize your clean with these popular extras.
pricing.saveRecurring: Save Up to 20% with a Recurring Plan
pricing.saveRecurringDesc: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly — pick a schedule and save on every clean.

booking.label: Reserve Your Clean
booking.title: Book Online. Pay Securely.
booking.subtitle: Fill out the form, choose your service, and we'll confirm your appointment within the hour.
booking.heroSubtitle: 3 simple steps and you're done. We'll take it from here.

testimonials.label: Happy Clients
testimonials.title: What Our Clients Are Saying
testimonials.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first!
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from real families across the country.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Havana Cleaning services, pricing, scheduling, and more.
faq.teamHappy: Our team is happy to help. Reach out anytime.
faq.beingPrepared: FAQs are being prepared. Check back soon!

areas.label: Where We Clean
areas.title: Where We Clean
areas.subtitle: Explore our service areas. We're growing nationwide.
areas.bodySubtitle: We proudly serve neighborhoods across the country, with deep roots in Florida.
areas.readyCta: Ready for a Spotless Home in {area}?
areas.bookDesc: Book your cleaning in under 2 minutes. Same-week availability.
areas.dontSeeArea: Don't see your neighborhood? We likely serve your area too!
areas.heroSubtitle: From Florida neighborhoods to communities nationwide, Havana Cleaning brings spotless service wherever you call home.

careers.label: Join the Family
careers.title: We're Hiring Cleaners
careers.subtitle: Join a team that values hard work, respect, and quality. No paperwork — apply 100% online.
careers.heroSubtitle: We're growing our family of professional cleaners. Competitive pay, flexible schedule, and a team that treats you right.
careers.applyDesc: Complete the application below. We review applications within 48 hours.

commercial.label: For Businesses
commercial.title: Commercial Cleaning
commercial.subtitle: Offices, retail spaces, medical facilities, restaurants — we keep your business looking professional and hygienic. Tell us about your space and we'll put together a custom plan.
commercial.requestQuoteDesc: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a custom quote.

cta.joinFamilies: Join 500+ families who trust Havana Cleaning. Book in minutes, pay securely online.
cta.joinHappy: Join hundreds of happy families. Book in minutes, pay securely online.

footer.tagline: Family-owned professional cleaning service. Quality you can trust, from Florida to your front door.
footer.madeWith: Made with love by the family, for your family.

blog.title: Cleaning Tips & Guides
